LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF ERNESTO BAGLIERI'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS IS GRANTED IN SUBSTANTIAL PART. MR. BALGIERI IS AWARDED: A) FEES OF $7500.00, CALCULATED AT 25 HOURS OF REASONABLY INCURRED ATTORNEY TIME AT THE REASONABLE BLENDED HOURLY RATE OF $300.00 PER HOUR, B) COSTS OF $1093.38, WHICH REFLECTS A DEDUCTION OF $321.84 FROM THE AMOUNT SOUGHT IN THE MOVING PAPERS; AND C) INTEREST ON THE JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,229.18. MR. BAGLIERI IS ENTITLED TO REASONABLY INCURRED FEES AND COSTS FOR HIS EFFORTS TO ENFORCE HIS JUDGMENT, INCLUDING FOR THE MOVING AND REPLY PAPERS FILED ON THIS MOTION. NONE OF THE WORK PERFORMED BY BAGLIERI'S COUNSEL IS PARTICULARLY CHALLENGING OR NOVEL AND THUS DID NOT REQUIRE THE SERVICES OF A $500.00 PER HOUR ATTORNEY. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Feb-06-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jeremy Pasternak, Esq., Telephone 415-693-0300, appearing for Plaintiff;
Stella Fey Epling, Esq., Telephone 415-433-1448, appearing for Defendant;

*The Law & Motion calendar for February 6, 2019 is heard by Judge Harold E. Kahn due to the unavailability of Judge Ethan P. Schulman.*

At the start of today's hearing, the Court states that Ms. Epling is the partner or spouse of a former colleague of his, now retired Judge Jim McBride but that doesn't cause him to be other than fair and impartial in this case.

Ruling - A R G U E D: Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Stella Fey Epling, Esq.'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD is granted. Counsel for defendant is to submit an order prepared on the Judicial Counsel Form.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600 email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/HEK)

MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES
Off Calendar Oct-26-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. Plaintiff Ernesto Baglieri's motion for attorney's fees and costs is granted in substantial part. Mr. Balgieri is awarded: a) fees of $7500.00, calculated at 25 hours of reasonably incurred attorney time at the reasonable blended hourly rate of $300.00 per hour, b) costs of $1093.38, which reflects a deduction of $321.84 from the amount sought in the moving papers; and c) interest on the judgment in the amount of $2,229.18. Mr. Baglieri is entitled to reasonably incurred fees and costs for his efforts to enforce his judgment, including for the moving and reply papers filed on this motion. None of the work performed by Baglieri's counsel is particularly challenging or novel and thus did not require the services of a $500.00 per hour attorney. Order signed.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
